---
title: "Lukas Pilz"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: /pictures/lukas_pic.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/LPI24
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukas-pilz-81a99a219/
---

## Hi, I'm Lukas!

I am a **Business Informatics** student at **TU Dresden**, specializing in **Machine Learning**. Currently, I work as a **Working Student at Dometa**, where I focus on automating building intelligence with supportive API scripts. I transform sensor data into actionable insights using real-time Thingsboard or Grafana dashboards.

With a professional background in **Logistics Planning**, I combine deep domain expertise with modern data science to build efficient, automated solutions.

**Data Science** – Specialized in predictive modeling and ML (Study focus).<br>
**Logistics Expertise** – Deep domain knowledge from my previous career path.<br>
**Automation** – Passionate about Smart Home, APIs, and Python/R scripting.<br>
**Visualisation** – Passionate in creating real-time dashboards with Grafana or Thingsboard.

---
*Check out my **Projects** to see my work in action or view my **CV** for the full story.*
